# PPTX Template Previews

Preview files generated by `scripts/gen_previews.js`.

## How to Generate

```bash
cd InsightEngine
node .github/skills/gen-slide/scripts/gen_previews.js
```

## Available Templates

### Light Themes

| Template | Style | Best For |
|----------|-------|----------|
| **corporate-blue** | Professional navy/blue | Business reports, quarterly reviews, client decks |
| **corporate-red** | Bold red corporate | Executive summaries, annual reports, formal presentations |
| **academic-serif** | Scholarly serif fonts | Research papers, academic lectures, thesis defense |
| **minimal-white** | Clean whitespace | Simple briefs, product demos, startup pitches |
| **minimal-gray** | Soft gray tones | Internal memos, team updates, casual presentations |
| **creative-gradient** | Purple-amber vibrant | Marketing decks, launch events, creative briefs |
| **creative-warm** | Earthy warm tones | Non-profit, community events, wellness content |
| **tech-modern** | Teal/blue modern | Product launches, SaaS demos, developer talks |

### Dark Themes

| Template | Style | Best For |
|----------|-------|----------|
| **dark-gradient** | Indigo/cyan dark | Tech conferences, engineering reviews, data presentations |
| **dark-neon** | Neon cyan/magenta | Gaming, hackathons, bold tech showcases |

## Auto-Selection Guide

```yaml
AUTO_SELECT:
  formal/business: corporate-blue
  executive/annual: corporate-red
  research/academic: academic-serif
  simple/brief: minimal-white
  internal/team: minimal-gray
  tech/engineering: dark-gradient
  gaming/bold: dark-neon
  marketing/launch: creative-gradient
  community/wellness: creative-warm
  product/saas: tech-modern
```

## Preview Files

Each preview contains 7 slides demonstrating:
1. Title slide
2. Section divider
3. Content with bullets
4. Two-column layout
5. Quote slide
6. Data table
7. Closing slide
